name: stagecoach
description: Stagecoach is a Claude Code plugin that takes a project from a free-form brief to a shipping production web app through a phased, subagent-driven workflow. v3 collapses ship-feature + ship-frontend into a single /stagecoach:deliver-stage loop that routes by stage type, dispatches the right sub-skill (init-design-system / scaffold-ci-cd / setup-environment) automatically, and gates every PR on a real verification (lint/type/build + a type-aware aggregating test review including dev-server boot and Claude-in-Chrome browser UAT for frontend slices). Frontend stages also pass through a non-skippable Library Preview Gate (Phase 4.5) — every new component AND every consumer-side edit to a user-visible surface of an existing library component gets staged into an operator-only /library preview route for explicit user approval before landing in production. Run /stagecoach:deliver-stage once per slice until the master checklist is done; /stagecoach:run-pipeline is the experimental autonomous multi-stage variant.
